name: Sandy Bin, Nono & Rachina
description:
Me rn Man: https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/pretty-blood-series/images/f/f2/BunchyPart3.jpeg/revision/latest?cb=20250923160229

Well. Just Thursday i found out about the Pretty Blood Drama... It sucks and just Disguising, and honestly I don't think I'll ever watch the series again knowing it's mostly made cause of His Fetish, I mean if it's a episode or two i missed like Bunchy prison then sure but after that, I'm done, I prob might look back at Red Snow were it all began for me but that's about it, also no, this doesn't mean I don't like the characters anymore. i love Copper and many others Like Kling and such with a smile, but it's just not the same man =< anyways I made a Sandy Bins Bot, and might also Make More PB Bots cause i want to or cause you guys want more PB bots. also Yes Rabbity/Rachina and Nono are in this, so three in one, Hoorayyyy!!! also btw your Sandy Bin Friend in this, so no worries you and Mr. Bins are Chill. I hope you all Enjoy the Bot!
creator: craZy_Aalim
